title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-16
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Garden ledger refreshed
gist.blurb: The greenhouse clipboard got its daily scribble. App metrics and health checks are freshly counted, because even a wild garden needs labels.
gist.summary: Refreshed the daily app metrics, health-check data, and greenhouse listings in apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md for 2026-07-16.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have an up-to-date snapshot of app activity and greenhouse health for the day.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy greenhouse maintenance scene: Polly, wearing a tiny gardener visor and holding a clipboard, checks rows of code-plants with small health meters while a CRT monitor robot updates a lime-green metrics board. The visual represents routine community app monitoring and a cared-for garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a warm community greenhouse where Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, black antennae, oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blush, a happy smile, light blue translucent wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checks a clipboard beside rows of flowering code-plants with small health meters; a chunky CRT monitor robot updates a prominent lime green (#ecf874) metrics board. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle pixel-font text: "DAILY CHECK".
